updates.tweet_text: 7505 support defending with precision in #ES_F. Last good long trigger though was the 7482 support test/7490 reclaim after the 6pm open. Targets remain 7534-39 (hit - heavy resistance), 7546 (hit), 7554 (not yet), 7575 (magnet - must backtest since we lost it last week) https://t.co/NBef6vyWcX

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: Final hour and we are back to 7490 big support. Watch for traps here and ES will need to recover 7506 with speed to start back up to 7534-39 target (hit), 7546 (hit), then 7554, 7575 (not yet). Newsletter just sent with newest entries. Big zone right here

updates.tweet_text:

Plan today: Ride runner until vol expands. 7522, 7532, 7548 next set. 7490=support https://t.co/02HqiWQHKX
